settings.image_quality_premium_desc: {{model}} — sharper and more detailed (auto-falls back to Standard on rate limit)

settings.guide_google_login_desc: Log in directly with your Google account (Gmail)

settings.guide_google_copy: Copy the string starting with AIza... and paste it above

settings.about_blend_1: Blend lets you use multiple AI models in one app.
settings.about_blend_2: It uses your own API keys (BYOK — Bring Your Own Key).
settings.about_blend_3: AI usage costs are billed directly by OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.
settings.about_blend_4: Blend subscription ($9/mo or $29 for 6 months) is the app usage fee.
settings.about_blend_5: Average API cost is ~$5/mo and varies by usage.
settings.api_key_byok_note: Your API key connects directly to each service. Check usage costs on their dashboards.

security_view.summary_desc: Blend is a server-less app. Your data is stored and processed only on your device.
security_view.footer_1: Your chats, files, and API keys are stored only in your browser on your device
security_view.footer_2: The Blend team cannot see your data — there is no server!
security_view.footer_3: AI companies (OpenAI, etc.) receive your messages, which is unavoidable when using AI
security_view.footer_4: Always delete your chats after using shared devices
security_view.cat_chat_subtitle: Where are my AI conversations stored?
security_view.cat_chat_q1: Can others see my chat content?
security_view.cat_chat_a1: No! Chat content is stored only on your device (phone/computer). Nothing is saved on Blend servers. It's like keeping a diary in your own drawer.
security_view.cat_chat_q2: Where do my messages go when I chat?
security_view.cat_chat_a2: Your messages are sent directly to the AI company you selected (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, etc.) — they do not pass through Blend servers. This means Blend cannot "see" your conversations.
security_view.cat_chat_q3: Does chat history disappear when I delete the app?
security_view.cat_chat_a3: Yes! Blend uses your browser's local storage (localStorage). When you clear browser data or delete the app, your chat history is gone too.
security_view.cat_chat_q4: Can someone on the same WiFi see my chats?
security_view.cat_chat_a4: All communication with AI companies uses HTTPS (encryption). Even on the same WiFi, your conversation content is encrypted and cannot be seen.
security_view.cat_docs_q1: Can others see documents I uploaded?
security_view.cat_docs_a1: No! Uploaded files are stored only in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB). Files are not uploaded to Blend servers. It's like saving to your computer's hard drive.
security_view.cat_docs_q2: Is it safe when document content is sent to AI?
security_view.cat_docs_a2: When AI references documents, only the relevant portions are selected and transmitted via HTTPS encrypted channel. The entire file is not sent at once.
security_view.cat_docs_q3: Are Google Drive and OneDrive files safe?
security_view.cat_docs_a3: After connecting, file contents are briefly read on your device for processing and not stored on Blend servers. However, the security policy of the respective cloud service (Google/Microsoft) applies.
security_view.cat_docs_a4: Passwords are never stored! OAuth is used so only a temporary token (valid for 1 hour) is briefly stored on your device. Blend cannot know your password.
security_view.cat_apikey_subtitle: Where are OpenAI, Google, etc. keys stored?
security_view.cat_apikey_q1: Is there a risk of API key exposure?
security_view.cat_apikey_a1: API keys are stored only in your browser's local storage. They are not transmitted or stored on Blend servers. However, losing your device or someone else using your browser could be risky.
security_view.cat_apikey_q2: Can Blend secretly use my API key?
security_view.cat_apikey_a2: Blend is a static website (no server). Your key is used only on your device, and there is no server for the Blend team to access. The source code is also publicly available.
security_view.cat_apikey_q3: Should I rotate API keys regularly?
security_view.cat_apikey_a3: For security, it is recommended to rotate every 3-6 months. Especially if you used it on a shared computer, replace it immediately!
security_view.cat_network_subtitle: Is data transmitted over the internet safe?
security_view.cat_network_a1: Yes! All communication between Blend and AI companies is encrypted with HTTPS/TLS. Even if intercepted, the content cannot be read. Like putting mail in an envelope.
security_view.cat_network_q2: Is it safe to use on public WiFi?
security_view.cat_network_a2: HTTPS encryption makes it relatively safe, but public WiFi is inherently risky. For important work, use a personal hotspot or home WiFi.
security_view.cat_network_q3: Does Blend collect my usage data?
security_view.cat_network_a3: Blend is a static site with no server. Only Vercel's (hosting company) basic access logs (IP, access time) are recorded. Your chats, documents, and keys are not collected.
security_view.cat_server_subtitle: How is the Blend app itself protected?
security_view.cat_server_a1: Blend is a server-less static site! There is no server to hack. Only code is deployed on Vercel CDN, making the attack surface very small.
security_view.cat_server_q2: Is the Blend app code safe?
security_view.cat_server_a2: Vercel is a world-class cloud company offering automatic HTTPS, DDoS protection, and global CDN protection. The app code is publicly available on GitHub for anyone to review.
security_view.cat_server_q3: Can AI companies' security be trusted?
security_view.cat_server_a3: OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic are all large enterprises with international security certifications such as SOC2 and ISO27001. Conversation content is handled according to each company's data processing policy.
security_view.cat_server_q4: Do AI companies use my conversations for training?
security_view.cat_server_a4: It varies by company. Conversations via API are mostly not used for training, but check each company's terms of service. OpenAI API does not use data for training by default.
security_view.cat_device_subtitle: How to protect your data on your device
security_view.cat_device_q1: Can family or colleagues see my chats?
security_view.cat_device_a1: If they use the same device and browser, yes. For sensitive content, use "Delete Chat" after use. Or use incognito mode so no history is saved.
security_view.cat_device_q2: Will data be leaked if I lose my device?
security_view.cat_device_a2: If your device has a lock (PIN, fingerprint, face recognition), it is safe. A lost unlocked device could expose browser-stored chats and API keys.
security_view.cat_device_q3: How do I completely delete my data?
security_view.cat_device_a3: Go to Settings → "Reset All Data" or delete the site data for blend.ai4min.com in browser settings. All chats, documents, and keys will be completely deleted.

agent_defaults.auto_match_desc: Analyzes your question and automatically selects the most suitable AI model.
agent_defaults.translator_desc: Professional translator providing natural Korean-English translations.
agent_defaults.translator_prompt: You are a professional translator. Perform natural and accurate translations between Korean and English. Consider context for natural translation while faithfully conveying the original meaning. Provide only the translation without explanations.
agent_defaults.coder_desc: Full-stack developer with 10 years of experience. Helps with code review, debugging, and architecture design.
agent_defaults.coder_prompt: You are a senior full-stack developer with 10 years of experience. Proficient in TypeScript, Python, and Go, with expertise in cloud architecture and system design. When writing code, always consider type safety, error handling, and testability. Keep answers concise and practical.
agent_defaults.writer_desc: Expert in writing marketing copy and content.
agent_defaults.writer_prompt: You are a digital marketing copywriter with 10 years of experience. Proficient in both Korean and English, you write SEO-optimized blog posts, social media copy, email marketing text, and landing page copy. You understand target customer psychology and write content that increases conversion rates.
agent_defaults.data_desc: Data analysis expert utilizing SQL, Python, and BI tools.
agent_defaults.data_prompt: You are a data analysis expert. Proficient in SQL, Python (pandas, numpy), and BI tools (Tableau, Power BI). You analyze data to derive insights, suggest visualizations, and support business decisions. Query optimization and data pipeline design are also possible.
agent_defaults.summarizer_desc: Concisely summarizes long documents, reports, and articles to their key points.
agent_defaults.summarizer_prompt: You are a professional document summarizer. Organize the key content of any length text into 3-5 bullet points, and present a one-sentence key conclusion at the end. Remove unnecessary content and sort by importance. After summarizing, present the most important quote from the original.
agent_defaults.emailwriter_desc: Writes business emails tailored to the situation.
agent_defaults.emailwriter_prompt: You are a business communication expert. When given the email purpose and recipient information, write an email with appropriate formality and tone. Available in both Korean and English. Provide in subject, body, signature format, and immediately incorporate any requested revisions.
agent_defaults.promptengineer_prompt: You are an AI prompt engineering expert. You analyze user prompts and improve them to get more accurate results. Apply the latest techniques such as chain-of-thought, few-shot, and role prompting. Present the improved prompt along with the reasons for improvement.

billing.hero_sub: One AI app — more affordable and smarter.
billing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
billing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade anytime.
billing.faq_cancel_a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. No lock-in contracts.
billing.faq_payment_a: We accept major credit cards via Stripe, Toss Payments (Korea), and Xendit (Philippines/SE Asia).
billing.faq_secure_a: Yes. All payments are processed through certified payment providers. We never store your card data.
billing.faq_benefits_q: What are the benefits of subscribing?
billing.faq_benefits_a: With a Blend subscription, you get access to all AI models (GPT, Claude, Gemini, and more) in one app. Premium features like voice chat, image generation, and meeting analysis are all included. Instead of paying $90+/month for separate subscriptions, you only pay for what you actually use — making Blend a much smarter choice.
billing.plan_pro_subtitle: For power users who want the best AI
billing.plan_free_subtitle: Start free with your API key
billing.lifetime_desc: All Pro features for 6 months — pay once
billing.lifetime_oneshot: No subscription · One-time payment · 6 months access
billing.lifetime_after: All features unlocked for 6 months after purchase
billing.byok_notice: Blend connects with your own API key. AI usage fees are billed separately by each service — avg. ~$5/mo.
billing.paddle_desc: Pay with card — Paddle supports Korea & 200+ countries worldwide.
billing.paddle_vat: VAT & tax handled automatically by Paddle.
billing.toss_desc: Pay via Toss Payments — Toss Pay, Kakao Pay, Naver Pay, card supported.
billing.xendit_desc: Pay via Xendit — GCash, Maya, credit/debit card for Philippines & SE Asia.
billing.xendit_note: Malaysia: Touch 'n Go, GrabPay, FPX also supported.

about.title: About Blend
about.hero_title: Blend is an AI relay platform
about.hero_subtitle: Connect multiple AI services in one app
about.card1_body: Blend is the bridge between you and AI. Like a TV remote, you can switch channels (AI models) anytime. ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini — all in one app!
about.card2_title: Connect with your own API key
about.card2_body: To use AI, you need a key (API key). Blend lets you hold that key yourself and connect directly to AI services. You only pay for what you use — about $5/month on average.
about.card3_body: Blend subscription covers the app. AI usage fees go directly to OpenAI, Anthropic, etc. They're two separate costs!
about.faq1_q: Is my API key stored on your servers?
about.faq1_a: No! Your API key is stored only on your device (browser). It is never sent to Blend's servers.
about.faq2_q: How much are AI usage fees?
about.faq2_a: It varies by usage, but typically $3–$10 per month. You can check real-time costs on the Blend dashboard.
about.why_title: The subscription trap — why $9 covers it all
about.why_hook_sub: Most AI subscribers use only 20–30% of their plan. The other $15 is a fixed fee for features you never touch.
about.why_api_title: API key = pay only what you use
about.why_api_body: With your own API key, there's no subscription — you pay OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google directly for actual usage. The Blend $9/mo is just the app fee to manage all three in one place.
about.why_note: * API fees are billed directly by OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google. Blend never touches that money.
